channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HLEGLAS] HLE Glascoat Ltd Distributes Proceeds from Sale of Fractional Shares to Eligible Shareholders
item.description:
HLE Glascoat Ltd has distributed proceeds from the sale of consolidated fractional entitlement to eligible shareholders of the Transferor Company in proportion to their entitlements. The distribution was carried out in accordance with the Scheme of Amalgamation between HLE Glascoat Ltd and Kinam Enterprise Private Limited, and SEBI regulations. The Audit Committee and Independent Directors of the Company have certified this distribution.

  • HLE Glascoat Ltd has distributed proceeds from the sale of consolidated fractional entitlement to eligible shareholders of the Transferor Company.
  • The distribution was carried out in proportion to the shareholders' entitlements.
  • The distribution was done in accordance with the Scheme of Amalgamation between HLE Glascoat Ltd and Kinam Enterprise Private Limited.
  • The Audit Committee and Independent Directors of the Company have certified this distribution.
  • The proceeds from the sale of fractional shares were distributed within 90 days from the date of allotment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HLE Glascoat Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [VEDL] Vedanta Emerges as Preferred Bidder for Karnapodikonda Bauxite Block, Strengthening Raw Material Security
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vedanta Ltd showcased a strong presence at Investing in African Mining Indaba 2026, championing its vision of the ‘Ubuntu of Natural Resources’. The company achieved green certifications, strengthening its sustainability portfolio across products, operations, and innovation. Vedanta has emerged as the preferred bidder for the Karnapodikonda bauxite block in Odisha, and Vedanta Aluminium deploys Odisha’s first all-women power operations team at Jharsuguda ahead of Women’s Day 2026. Hindustan Zinc and JNCASR develop advanced zinc-ion battery prototypes, and Vedanta Aluminium scales up billet capacity to 830,000 TPA at Jharsuguda. Hindustan Zinc ranks in the top 1% globally in the S&P Sustainability Yearbook 2026.

  • Vedanta showcased a strong presence at Investing in African Mining Indaba 2026
  • Achieved green certifications to strengthen sustainability portfolio
  • Emerged as the preferred bidder for the Karnapodikonda bauxite block in Odisha
  • Vedanta Aluminium deploys Odisha’s first all-women power operations team at Jharsuguda
  • Hindustan Zinc and JNCASR develop advanced zinc-ion battery prototypes

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vedanta Limited | Category: Deals

item.title: [MONEYBOXX] Moneyboxx Finance Ltd Allots Equity Shares Worth INR 33.44 Crore on Preferential Basis
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Moneyboxx Finance Limited has allotted 44,00,000 Equity Shares at a price of Rs. 76 per share, amounting to INR 33,44,00,000. The shares have been allotted on a preferential basis to various investors, including promoters and non-promoters. The face value of each share is Rs. 10, with a premium of Rs. 66 per share. The allotment increases the company's issued and paid-up equity share capital from Rs. 65,40,92,000 to Rs. 69,80,92,000. The list of investors is provided in Annexure-A of the document.

  • Moneyboxx Finance Ltd allots 44,00,000 Equity Shares
  • Allotment worth INR 33,44,00,000 on preferential basis
  • Face value of each share is Rs. 10 with a premium of Rs. 66
  • Issued and paid-up equity share capital increases from Rs. 65,40,92,000 to Rs. 69,80,92,000
  • Investors include promoters and non-promoters

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Moneyboxx Finance Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [MARBLE] Marble City India Ltd Board Approves Conversion of 6,45,101 Warrants to Equity Shares for Promoter Group
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Marble City India Ltd announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on 03.03.2026. The Board approved the conversion of 6,45,101 warrants into an equal number of equity shares for the Promoter Group. The warrants were allotted on September 10, 2024, at an issue price of Rs. 17.00 each (including a premium of Rs. 12.00 each). The allottees will receive 75% of the issue price per warrant, amounting to Rs. 12.75 per warrant, upon exercise of their rights of conversion into equity shares. The new equity shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Company. The issued and paid-up capital of the Company stands increased to Rs. 12,75,75,540 consisting of 2,55,15,108 equity shares of Rs. 5/- each.

  • Marble City India Ltd Board Meeting approved the conversion of 6,45,101 warrants into equity shares for the Promoter Group.
  • The warrants were allotted on September 10, 2024, at an issue price of Rs. 17.00 each (including a premium of Rs. 12.00 each).
  • Allottees to receive 75% of the issue price per warrant, amounting to Rs. 12.75 per warrant, upon exercise of their rights of conversion into equity shares.
  • The new equity shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Company.
  • The issued and paid-up capital of the Company stands increased to Rs. 12,75,75,540 consisting of 2,55,15,108 equity shares of Rs. 5/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Marble City India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [RRFIN] RR Financial Consultants Ltd Subsidiary Converted from Private to Public Limited Company
item.description:
RR Financial Consultants Ltd has announced the conversion of its subsidiary, RR Investors Capital Services Private Limited, into a Public Limited Company. The new name of the subsidiary is RRINVESTORS CAPITAL SERVICES LIMITED. The conversion was approved by the Registrar of Companies and is in effect from 31st March, 2026. The reason for this conversion is to enhance governance, improve transparency, enable easier access to capital markets, and align with long-term strategic growth and potential listing plans. There is no change in the shareholding pattern or control of the subsidiary by RR Financial Consultants Ltd.

  • RR Investors Capital Services Private Limited has been converted into a Public Limited Company.
  • The new name of the subsidiary is RRINVESTORS CAPITAL SERVICES LIMITED.
  • The conversion was approved by the Registrar of Companies and is in effect from 31st March, 2026.
  • The conversion is aimed at enhancing governance, improving transparency, enabling easier access to capital markets, and aligning with long-term strategic growth and potential listing plans.
  • There is no change in the shareholding pattern or control of the subsidiary by RR Financial Consultants Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RR FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS LTD. | Category: Subsidiaries

item.title: [PREMCAP] Premier Capital Services Ltd Appoints Mrs. Mansi Birla as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
item.description:
Premier Capital Services Ltd has appointed Mrs. Mansi Birla as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer of the company. Mrs. Birla is a qualified Company Secretary, having Membership No. A65090 and is an Associate Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI). She has experience in dealing with matters of Companies Act, Listing Regulations and allied laws. The appointment is effective from 03rd March, 2026.

  • Premier Capital Services Ltd has appointed a new Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
  • Mrs. Mansi Birla is a qualified Company Secretary with experience in dealing with matters of Companies Act, Listing Regulations and allied laws
  • Mrs. Birla's appointment is effective from 03rd March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIER CAPITAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PATANJALI] Patanjali Foods Loses Appeal Against GST Demand of Rs. 44,82,198/-
item.description:
Patanjali Foods Ltd. has lost an appeal against a GST demand of Rs. 44,82,198/- and a penalty amount of the same amount. The appeal was filed against an order passed by the Office of the Commissioner, CGST(Appeals), Meerut. The company does not expect any financial liability except for the said demand and penalty amount. This will not have any impact on the financial, operational, and other activities of the company. The company will be taking necessary action to defend its case before the appellate authority.

  • Patanjali Foods loses appeal against GST demand of Rs. 44,82,198/- and penalty of the same amount
  • The appeal was filed against an order passed by the Office of the Commissioner, CGST(Appeals), Meerut
  • The company does not expect any financial liability except for the said demand and penalty amount
  • This will not have any impact on the financial, operational, and other activities of the company
  • The company will be taking necessary action to defend its case before the appellate authority

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Patanjali Foods Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [AYE] Aye Finance pilots Generative AI model for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
item.description:
Aye Finance, a leading provider of business loans to micro-scale MSMEs, has successfully completed a pilot that uses Generative AI technology to estimate business sales from images of store premises and other parameters. This cutting-edge solution significantly reduces the 'cost-to-serve' for the micro-enterprise segment and is built on extensive internal datasets, providing a reliable estimate of monthly sales using store images as input. This breakthrough innovation automates complex underwriting components, allowing for unprecedented speed, consistency, and the potential for extension to other sectors and industries.

  • Aye Finance completes pilot using Generative AI technology for image-based underwriting of trading businesses
  • The new solution significantly reduces 'cost-to-serve' for micro-enterprise segment
  • In-house developed system transforms unstructured store images into actionable financial insights
  • Automation of income estimation through Generative AI reduces manual fieldwork and increases speed and reliability of credit decisions
  • Aye Finance continues to demonstrate success in lending to micro-enterprise businesses with advanced technology support

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AYE | Category: Investment

item.title: [POLYMED] Poly Medicure Ltd. Officials to Participate in Investec India Promoter & Founder Conference 2026
item.description:
Poly Medicure Ltd. has announced its participation in the 'Investec India Promoter & Founder Conference 2026'. The company's officials will be part of an Investor Meet on March 9, 2026, in Mumbai and one-on-one meetings on March 10, 2026. The schedule is subject to changes and no Unpublished Price Sensitive Information will be shared during the meeting. The information is also available on the company's website.

  • Poly Medicure Ltd. to participate in Investec India Promoter & Founder Conference 2026
  • Company's officials to attend Investor Meet in Mumbai on March 9, 2026
  • One-on-one meetings scheduled for March 10, 2026
  • Schedule subject to changes due to exigencies
  • No Unpublished Price Sensitive Information will be shared during the meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POLY MEDICURE LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [HARAFIN] Haryana Financial Corporation Sends Annual Report and Notice of AGM to Shareholders
item.description:
Haryana Financial Corporation (HFC) has sent a letter to shareholders providing the web-link to the complete Annual Report for the financial year 2024-25 and the notice of the 58th Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held on March 25, 2026. The notice and annual report are available electronically for shareholders with registered email addresses. For those without registered email addresses, a letter with the web-link to the annual report and AGM notice will be sent to their registered address.

  • Haryana Financial Corporation has sent a letter to shareholders with the web-link to the Annual Report and notice of the 58th AGM.
  • The AGM will be held on March 25, 2026, at 03:30 PM in the Committee Room of The Haryana State Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd.
  • The Annual Report and AGM notice are available electronically for shareholders with registered email addresses.
  • A letter with the web-link to the annual report and AGM notice will be sent to the registered address of shareholders without registered email addresses.
  • The Annual Report and AGM notice are for the financial year 2024-25.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HARYANA FINANCIAL CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Monthly Update
